unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My hands were dirty because I'd been repairing my bike.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: re(重新) + pair(一双/一对) -> 把零件重新配成对，就是修理机器。
brea(看作bread, 面包) + th(头) -> 闻到面包的香味，深呼吸一口气。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We'd been playing tennis for about half an hour when it started to rain heavily.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: heavy(重的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 沉重地，或雨下得很大猛烈地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The people waiting at the bus stop were getting impatient.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: im(不，否定) + patient(有耐心的) -> 没有耐心的，即不耐烦的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Anna woke up in the middle of the night. She was frightened and didn't know where she was. She'd been having a bad dream.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dr(打扰) + eam(看作team, 团队) -> 做梦梦见有一支团队在打扰我。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Anna woke up in the middle of the night. She was frightened and didn't know where she was.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fright(惊恐) + en(使...) + ed(形容词后缀) -> 使感到惊恐的，就是害怕的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I was disappointed when I had to cancel my holiday.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: can(能) + cel(看作cell, 单人牢房) -> 在牢房里什么也干不了，只能取消所有计划。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Soon after the orchestra began playing, something strange happened.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: or(或者) + ches(切斯，国际象棋) + tra(看作train, 火车) -> 乐队成员要么在下棋，要么在火车上排练。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The orchestra had been playing for about ten minutes when a man in the audience suddenly started shouting.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: audi(听) + ence(名词后缀) -> 用耳朵听音乐会的人，就是听众和观众。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: John and I went for a walk. He was walking very fast and I had difficulty keeping up with him.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: difficult(困难的) + y(名词后缀) -> 困难，费力。
